LAW AND MOTION 302, NO APPEARANCE ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. DEFENDANTS CALIFORNIA RECONVEYANCE COMPANY, JP MORGAN CHASE BANK, N.A.'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS CONTINUED TO AUGUST 20, 2012 TO BE HEARD IN DEPARTMENT 501 AT 9:30AM. CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-23-2012 Off Calendar

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Aug-20-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances - Atty. Roxana Vatanparast of Bryan Cave LLP (415-675-3400) appearing for defendant Washington Mutual Bank moving party. No other appearance.

Court adopted its tentative ruling, DEFENDANTs CALIFORNIA RECONVEYANCE COMPANY and JP MORGAN CHASE BANK's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is Sustained with leave to amend. See CCP 430.10(e) & (F). No opposition filed. Order signed in open court. Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk K. Liu, not reported. (501/REQ)

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Aug-13-2012 Continued To Aug-20-12 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANTs CALIFORNIA RECONVEYANCE COMPANY, JP MORGAN CHASE BANK, N.A.'s DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is Continued to August 20, 2012 to be heard in Department 501 at 9:30am. Moving party is required to provide a courtesy copy of the operative complaint with a cover letter reflecting the new hearing date by August 15, 2012 at 4pm as required by San Francisco Local Rule 2.6C. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Sherry Sawyer CSR # 5976
